Intraday post (22/July)

Here is the monthly post (with free education on momentum),and the weekly post with monthly updated.

Let’s dive into the daily positioning and opportunities…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The positioning is still bets on ranging around 6289.95 centroid, with capped upside and managed downside, for today a bit tighter. This aligns with the weekly post. In the powerhour we will have a pivot/’line in the sand’ at 6293, and the centroid can either pull the price to itself, if spot is above the line; or 6310/00 zone can magnetize the spot, if spot is above the line.

The downside pivot is at 6280.09; it can be broken only if you see decreasing realized vol around it, and bid on the left wing of the smirk. Then 6252 is the support, and 6260 can magnetize it after 1PM.

Upside pivot is 6301.83; above this line the 6310 gamma will have a gravitational effect on the spot. It is pronunced after 2.50PMIt could be broken only if vol catches up, bid on the right-wing of the smirk.This way, the upside max is 6346; but this is a ver unlikely scenario. (Market would need to break above 6323 range to escape 6310 gravtity)

Market expects artificial liquidity between the centroid and 6310 gamma, and some downside imbalance during the day, but nothing serious.To me, it seems like one directional bet only, but mostly a premium selling day.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
